questions.question: Simplify i^7.
questions.explanation: Divide the exponent by 4: 7 = 4(1) + 3, so i^7 = i^3 = i^2 · i = -1 · i = -i.

questions.question: What is (3 + 2i) + (1 - 5i)?
questions.explanation: Add real parts: 3 + 1 = 4. Add imaginary parts: 2i - 5i = -3i. Result: 4 - 3i.

questions.question: Multiply: (2 + i)(3 - i). Write your answer in the form a + bi.
What is the value of i^24?
Subtract: (5 - 3i) - (2 + 4i). Write your answer in the form a + bi.
Evaluate i^5 + i^9 + i^13.
questions.explanation: i^5 = i^(4+1) = i, i^9 = i^(8+1) = i, i^13 = i^(12+1) = i. Sum: i + i + i = 3i. (Correction: i^5 = i, i^9 = i, i^13 = i, so 3i.) Actually: i + i + i = 3i is correct.
